evals.name: basic-scout-under-budget
evals.prompt: Scout trade-up opportunities under R25 and show me the most profitable one without executing.
evals.expected_output: Should call GET /api/trade-ups/opportunities with maxCost=25, display the top opportunity with inputs, cost, and profit details. No purchase should occur.

evals.name: scout-and-execute-full-flow
evals.prompt: Find and execute a trade-up under R50. Scout first to verify items are available, then if confirmed, execute the purchase.
evals.expected_output: Should discover opportunity, submit scout job, poll status, show results (items found/cost), ask for confirmation, then submit purchase job if approved. Final report of purchase status.

evals.name: handle-partial-scout
evals.prompt: Scout a trade-up under R100 and report what happens if some inputs are not fully available on the market.
evals.expected_output: Should handle the case where inputsScouted shows some items with needed > found. Should report shortfall clearly and ask user if they want to proceed with partial execution or try a different opportunity.
